import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; function About() { return (

About CareAfrica

Empowering communities through technology-driven wildlife conservation in Africa

Our Mission

CareAfrica is dedicated to protecting Africa's wildlife through innovative technology and community engagement. We focus on digital conservation, sustainable tourism, and empowering local communities to become active participants in wildlife preservation.

Our Core Values

Technology Integration

Utilizing cutting-edge tools like AI, drones, and mobile applications for effective conservation

Community Empowerment

Engaging local communities in conservation efforts through education and participation

Sustainable Development

Promoting eco-friendly practices and sustainable income generation through wildlife conservation

Our Approach

Digital Monitoring

Using advanced technology for real-time wildlife tracking and anti-poaching efforts

Community Education

Providing training and resources to local communities for effective conservation

Research & Development

Continuous improvement of conservation methods through research and innovation

Our Impact

1000+

Community Members Trained

50+

Conservation Projects

10+

Protected Areas Supported

); } export default About;
